creator: s@cassiba.com
text:
mail/thunderbird fails to build after the port was updated to 6.0.  This is identical to ports/159831 against www/firefox, and similarly removing spidermonkey lets me build thunderbird.

Fix: a temporary measure is to register a build conflict with spidermonkey, identical to firefox, until this can be fixed

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: attempt to build mail/thunderbird with lang/spidermonkey installed
